mapper.select: select period_id, customer_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time from sb_customer_period_log where customer_id = #{customerId} order by start_time desc
select end_time from sb_customer_period_log where customer_id = #{customerId} and period_type = 'usage' order by end_time desc limit 1

select period_id, customer_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time from sb_customer_period_log where customer_id = #{customerId} and period_type = #{periodType} and end_time is null order by start_time desc limit 1
mapper.update: update sb_customer_period_log set end_time = #{endTime} where period_id = #{periodId}
mapper.insert: insert into sb_customer_period_log (period_id, customer_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{periodId}, #{customerId}, #{periodType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
